    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    G

    Game - Class in Unnamed Package
    Serves as the main orchestrator for "Yohane The Parhelion! The Siren in the Mirror World!".
    GameCharacter - Class in Character_Classes
    Represents an active character entity in the Mirror World of Numazu.
    GameCharacter(String, float, float, int, int) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Constructs a character at a specified grid position with no dialogue.
    GameCharacter(String, float, float, String) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Constructs a character with base stats, dialogue, and sets position to (0,0).
    GameCharacter(String, String) - Constructor for class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Constructs a non-combatant character (e.g., Shopkeeper) with dialogue at (0,0).
    gameOver(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Monitors the user's survival state.
    generateFloor() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Parses the flat document matrix file stream to initialize structural symbols, allocating destructible elements and forwarding enemy spawn definitions seamlessly.
    getAttack() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Retrieves the base offensive strength score used during combat interactions.
    getCauseOfDeath() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
    Retrieves the explanation or name of the entity/hazard that defeated the character.
    getColLen() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Gets the maximum number of columns (vertical width) defining the map boundaries.
    getCurFloor() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Retrieves the active floor location index step.
    getCurItem() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
    Gets the item that is currently selected or focused for the character's next action.
    getDamage() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Retrieves the value of environmental penalty damage associated with this element.
    getDetectionRange() - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
    Retrieves the distance threshold within which this entity can spot or track the player.
    getDialogue() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Retrieves the text line spoken or triggered when interacting with this character.
    getDungeonNum() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Retrieves the sequential dungeon number index.
    getEnemies() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Retrieves a collection of all active opponents currently present on this floor.
    getFloorNum() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Gets the current level or dungeon floor the player is exploring.
    getFloors() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Retrieves the array holding floor records.
    getGoldDrop() - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
    Calculates or retrieves the amount of currency awarded when this entity is defeated.
    getGoldDrop() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
    Retrieves the currency amount dropped upon destruction.
    getGoldOwned() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
     
    getHealAmount() - Method in class Item_Classes.ConsumableItem
    Retrieves the configured health restoration value of the consumable item.
    getHealth() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Retrieves the character's remaining life or durability points.
    getInventory() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
    Retrieves the character's entire inventory.
    getItem() - Method in class Character_Classes.NPChar
    Retrieves the specific item currently carried or held by this NPC.
    getItemDrop() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
    Retrieves the item payload dropped upon destruction.
    getMap() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Retrieves the entire grid layout of the game world.
    getMaxHealth() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
     
    getMember() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Retrieves the associated member.
    getName() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Retrieves the display name identifying the character entity.
    getName() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Retrieves the name string representation of the dungeon.
    getName() - Method in class Item_Classes.Item
    Retrieves the name identification string of the item.
    getNumFloors() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Retrieves the total capacity boundary count of floors.
    getPrice() - Method in class Item_Classes.Item
    Retrieves the associated monetary gold price of the item.
    getRowLen() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Gets the maximum number of rows (horizontal height) defining the map boundaries.
    getSaved() - Method in class Character_Classes.NPChar
    Checks the rescue status of the NPC to see if they are out of danger.
    getSymbol() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Retrieves the visual symbol character identifier of this tile.
    getTreasure() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
    Checks if the tile contains treasure contents.
    getTurnCount() - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
     
    getTurnsPerMove() - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
    Gets the movement delay factor determining how frequently this entity acts relative to game turns.
    getX() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Gets the current horizontal placement index on the world map grid.
    getX() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Retrieves the row position index of this tile.
    getY() - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Gets the current vertical placement index on the world map grid.
    getY() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Retrieves the column position index of this tile.
